attr.title: barrel roll
attr.desc:
Barrel roll is a puzzle game that makes you think outside the barrel to find solutions to each level.

You're a cute little guy named Bruno who just woke up in this abandoned castle, your mission is to go around sorting all kinds of button puzzles with your trusty barrel!
attr.inst: Download the game directly from the itch.io website. Extract the files and place them in the ports/barrelroll/assets directory.
